title: tetrapilus dentatus
intro: Tetrapilus dentatus, also known as the four-angled prickly pear cactus, is a species of cactus native to Australia that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tetrapilus dentatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
